findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 41. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Bold emphasis removed from agenda topic headings within the table
findings.evidence: In the PDF, topic titles such as 'Review Agenda and Brief Introductions', 'Project Finance Update', 'Project Status', 'Discuss Model Schematic', 'Discuss Data Collection', 'Discuss Next Steps', and 'Adjourn' are rendered in bold to distinguish them from sub-bullet text. In the HTML table, these same topic titles appear in regular (non-bold) weight, losing the visual differentiation from their bullet-point details.
